name: runebaseinfo-ui
description: An open-source frontend for the Runebaseinfo API

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m 'chore(release): bump to v%s'; npm run build && git add dist/ && git commit -m "chore(build): release" --no-verify
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m 'chore(release): bump to v%s'; npm run build && git add dist/ && git commit -m "chore(build): release" --no-verify
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m 'chore(release): bump to v%s'; npm run build && git add dist/ && git commit -m "chore(build): release" --no-verify
